raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the left face of box_2. There is at least 15 cm of free tabletop space to the right of box_2, and the black cup is in front of box_2 so it will not be contacted during a purely lateral push.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, leaving a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 sufficient for both arms to approach the sides of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A gap now exists on both sides of box_1. No objects obstruct vertical clearance above the box. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 and apply gentle inward force without using the claws.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the table surface, completing the pickup of the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the left face of box_2. There is at least 15 cm of free tabletop space to the right of box_2, and the black cup is in front of box_2 so it will not be contacted during a purely lateral push.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, leaving a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 sufficient for both arms to approach the sides of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: A gap now exists on both sides of box_1. No objects obstruct vertical clearance above the box. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 and apply gentle inward force without using the claws.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the table surface, completing the pickup of the darker box.
